title: The Art Thief Who Stole a Painting... with a Pencil?
title_full: The Art Thief Who Stole a Painting... with a Pencil? #Shorts #facts #didyouknow #art
description:
Could you steal art?

Discover the unbelievable art heist where a priceless Rembrandt was stolen without triggering any alarms. The thief's ingenious method involved nothing more than a pencil and a lot of nerve. Follow for more! #Shorts
